events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Ringo Starr, the man who kept the beat for the biggest band in the world, is still bringing the peace and love. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the one and only Brian May! From astrophysics to stadium rock anthems, he truly is a legend. What's the Queen track that always gets you?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Moves
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. Which Rolling Stones track has the best Jagger swagger?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV, the iconic music television channel, launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV changed music forever with its very first video. The irony of The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' still makes us smile. What was the first music video you ever saw?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a Britpop milestone.

angles.name: Britpop Icon
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. Which track from their debut still gets you singing along?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, opened on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history. If you could have been there, which artist would you have seen?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: We remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost the one and only King of Rock and Roll. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to inspire. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that commands attention. What's your go-to Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad Fer It!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock and roll star swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: The original iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since the first iPod dropped? A game-changer for music lovers everywhere. How many songs did you cram onto your first one?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, Dr. No, on this date in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes, 007 always delivers. Who's your favourite Bond and why?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: We remember John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His message of peace and love resonates as strongly as ever. What's the Lennon song that means the most to you?
